race.description: L Mcpherson Breed For Speed Final Mobile Trot (L)
race.comment: KEAYANG GYPSY (5) was too good in a heat of this series last time out, leading from a similar draw to score by 6.6m at Bendigo. Overcame a back row draw to score the last time she raced here last month, taking her record at this circuit and distance to two from three. She looks tough to stop again. RUBYS DREAM (8) drew wide and was out of position at the start when runner-up to KEAYANG GYPSY last start. Had come from 20m handicaps for a win and a close second in her previous two outings. Has won two of three tries at this distance and draws for a trail so could be dangerous. ALDEBARAN SUSANNE (2) came from the back row when fourth to KEAYANG GYPSY in the heat so is better served by this barrier. MAC FLICK (7) had to work hard last start. Draws wide again but had won two of her previous three starts and her record at this distance stands at three from five.
